title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Honeywell India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Honeywell India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Honeywell India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Honeywell India:
Honeywell India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India!
